name: CryptoHog
description: HOGSCOIN is the native token of the HogHerd ecosystem — a decentralized platform on BNB Chain built to help users discover, analyze, trade, and support high-potential meme tokens. HogHerd is a platform designed to help new crypto projects launch, grow, and gain visibility within the BNB Chain ecosystem. It provides tools for token creation, project discovery, and community-driven reputation systems that help users evaluate emerging tokens. The platform combines several key components, including token launch infrastructure, analytics tools, and discovery features such as the Gem Scanner, which helps identify promising assets on BNB Chain. HogHerd also introduces reputation and trust mechanisms that allow the community to evaluate projects and highlight the most promising ones. By bringing these elements together in a single ecosystem, HogHerd aims to create a more transparent environment where project creators can build and promote their tokens while users can more easily discover new opportunities in the crypto market.
